problem text: Three sharpshooters $X$, $Y$, and $Z$ take turns firing at a target. $X$ goes first, followed by $Y$, then $Z$, and this sequence repeats until one successfully hits the target. Each marksman has a $50\%$ chance of hitting the target on their turn, independent of the other shots. Determine the probability that $X$ is the first to hit the target.
